title: From White Hat to Gray Area
relevance_summary: Bug bounty platform OpenBounty soliciting reports for third-party programs, potentially leading to front-running vulnerabilities.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that submits vulnerabilities to OpenBounty for third-party programs.

red_flags: Submitting vulnerabilities to OpenBounty for non-self-hosted programs
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that submits vulnerabilities to OpenBounty for third-party programs.
summary: CertiK's OpenBounty platform was accused of front-running bug reports for third-party programs, raising concerns about potential conflicts of interest and ethical misconduct.
